title: selaginella kriegeriana
intro: Selaginella kriegeriana, also known as Krieger's spikemoss or resurrection fern, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant in the Selaginellaceae family that is native to tropical regions. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella kriegeriana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antioxidant activity, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, extracts, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
